rulings.Case Title: IN RE: THE WOLF FIRM IN RE 932 HAMILTON ST. S.F., CA.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Claim To Surplus Funds

Hearing on the claims to the surplus funds will be noticed by the clerk of the Court upon receipt of the funds. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: DALE DUNCAN ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendants To Further Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Additional Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF DALE DUNCAN, MARTA MUNOZ MENDOZA Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendants To Further Respond To Written Discovery And To Produce Additional Documents And Request For Sanctions is transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on October 26, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC. VS. EAST WEST BANK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication On The Third Amended Complaint In Favor Of Deft East West Bank
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT EAST WEST BANK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication On The Third Amended Complaint In Favor Of Deft East West Bank is GRANTED as to the first and third causes of action. Moving party shifted its burden re: causes of action as pleaded in the Third Amended Complaint. Opposing party failed to provide competent admissible evidence to create a triable issue of material fact as to the issues framed by the operative pleadings. Request for attorney's fees must be addressed by a motion for attorney's fees. Prevailing party to prepare order in accordance with CCP 437c(g). =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ***TRANSFERRED TO BUTTE COUNTY***TAMARA HAWORTH VS. AMANDA ROSS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Amanda Ross, Baco Realty Corporation, Chico Villa East Associates And Palo Verde Apartments, Llc'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 6. Defendants Amanda Ross, Baco Realty Corporation, Chico Villa East Associates And Palo Verde Apartments, LLC'S Demurrer To First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is sufficiently alleged. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ***TRANSFERRED TO BUTTE COUNTY***TAMARA HAWORTH VS. AMANDA ROSS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Amanda Ross, Baco Realty Corporation, Chico Villa East Associates And Palo Verde Apartments, Llc'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim From Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 6. Defendants Amanda Ross, Baco Realty Corporation, Chico Villa East Associates And Palo Verde Apartments, Llc'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim From Amended Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently alleged as to corporate defendants. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TERANEQA RILEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 9. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED and stayed pending the certification for 2016 and 2017. If Defendant is certified for 2016 and 2017 and Plaintiff receives subsidy funds, judgment shall be vacated. If Defendant is certified for 2017, but Plaintiff does not receive the subsidy for 2016 (for the period after May 31, 2016) Defendant shall compensate Plaintiff in the amount of the subsidy not received within 30 days of notice from Plaintiff that no such subsidy was approved/certified/received. Parties to appear and advise the Court of the appropriate date to calendar a status report. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID FALCON VS. MARGARET MAMER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT MARGARET MAMER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant demurs to the "complaint" on the ground that "the complaint fails to allege facts sufficient to state a cause of action." (Notice of Demurrer 1:25-2:1). The Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: SANDY LAU ET AL VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFRA
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday October 13, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT HAMZA BOUCHAFRA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. =(501/SRB)
